name: functions
purpose: Firebase Cloud Functions v2 backend — Node 22, TypeScript, Sentry, firebase-admin, zod. Standalone subproject with its own package.json/tsconfig/.gitignore.
notes: Subproject boundary: own package.json (name=functions, node=22 engine), tsconfig.json, tsconfig.dev.json, .gitignore. Subdirs: src/ (8 .ts source files), lib/ (compiled .js+.map, gitignored per functions/.gitignore). 35 files total excluding node_modules (src: 8 ts, lib: 9 js + 9 map + 4 json + 1 nvmrc). Key src files: index.ts, admin.ts, jobs.ts, security-logger.ts, security-wrapper.ts, recaptcha-verify.ts, firestore-rate-limiter.ts, schemas.ts. Deployed via `firebase deploy --only functions`. No Claude-Code artifacts found.

name: hooks-product
purpose: React custom hooks (product code) — 4 TypeScript files providing useGeolocation, useJournal, useSpeechRecognition, useDailyQuote.
notes: DISAMBIGUATION: This is React product hooks (use-*.ts files), NOT git hooks and NOT Claude Code .claude/hooks/. Files: use-daily-quote.ts, use-geolocation.ts, use-journal.ts, use-speech-recognition.ts. No package.json, no tsconfig — just 4 standalone hook files at top level. No subdirs. No Claude-adjacent artifacts. Entirely product code. The separate lib/hooks/ subdir also contains React hooks (use-tab-refresh.ts). No relationship to .claude/hooks/ (covered by D3a-b).

name: eslint-plugin-sonash
purpose: Custom ESLint plugin packaging 32 security/quality rules specific to SoNash patterns — standalone npm-style package within the repo.
notes: Subproject-style layout: index.js (plugin entry), rules/ (32 .js rule files), lib/ast-utils.js. No package.json or tsconfig — depends on root-level eslint.config.mjs. 34 files, all .js. Key rules: no-hallucinated-api, no-hardcoded-secrets, no-path-startswith, no-shell-injection, no-sql-injection, no-raw-error-log, no-toctou-file-ops, no-unsafe-error-access — security-focused. Portability: the security rules are highly portable; only plugin name binding needs sanitization. No Claude-adjacent artifacts. Tests for this plugin exist in tests/eslint-plugin-sonash.test.js and tests/scripts/skills/.

name: analysis
purpose: AI-generated analysis artifacts — full inventory, deduplication, dependency, categorization, and effort-estimation passes against SoNash codebase.
notes: 16 files: 15 .md + 1 .csv. Top-level files only (no subdirs). Contents: FULL_ANALYSIS_SUMMARY.md, INTEGRATION_SUMMARY.md, PARALLEL_EXECUTION_GUIDE.md, README.md, effort_estimates.md, full_categorization.md, full_deduplication.md, full_dependencies.md, full_inventory.csv, full_inventory.md, pass1_inventory.md through pass5_effort.md. Looks like output of a multi-pass AI analysis workflow. Portable as a methodology artifact; content is project-specific and not portable. No Claude-adjacent artifacts.

name: docs
purpose: Developer and AI-workflow documentation hub — 353 files spanning process docs, audit records, agent guidance, schemas, patterns, and archived decisions.
notes: 353 files: 218 .md, 113 .jsonl, 10 .json, 8 .gitkeep, 1 .txt. Size: 38MB (dominant). Subdirs: agent_docs/ (12), aggregation/ (7), archive/ (133), audits/ (119), decisions/ (1), patterns/ (1), plans/ (5), schemas/ (1), source-data/ (1), technical-debt/ (32), templates/ (8). Plus 33 root-level files. Classification: mixed developer-facing and AI-workflow docs. Notable: agent_docs/ contains SKILL_AGENT_POLICY.md, AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md, CODING_TOOLS_REFERENCE.md — these are Claude-Code workflow documents (cross-reference to D-agents for skills/agents). docs/schemas/ has agent-token-usage.schema.json. The .jsonl files in docs/ (113 files) are likely audit aggregation or script output data. archive/ (133 files) is largest subdir — historical decisions. No Claude-adjacent hook/CLAUDE.md artifacts found.

name: tests
purpose: Primary test suite — 232 files across unit, integration, e2e, security, enforcement, and script tests. Main test directory.
notes: 232 files: 220 .ts, 12 .js. Size: 2.2M. Subdirs: scripts/ (181 files — dominant, covers all script categories), hooks/ (22 files), utils/ (6), semgrep/ (3), integration/ (2), e2e/ (1), enforcement/ (1), perf/ (1), security/ (1). Root-level test files (14): auth-provider.test.ts, callable-errors.test.ts, collections.test.ts, cross-doc-deps.test.js, enforcement-manifest.test.ts, error-knowledge-base.test.ts, escalate-deferred.test.ts, eslint-plugin-sonash.test.js, firestore-service.test.ts, override-analytics.test.js, pattern-compliance.test.js, temporal-coverage.test.ts, time-rotation.test.ts, use-daily-quote.test.ts. ACTIVE — this is the primary, comprehensive test directory. Distinct from test/ (see below). No Claude-adjacent artifacts.

name: test
purpose: Test fixtures directory — JSON fixture files for ecosystem-v2 data contracts (deferred items, invocations, retros, reviews).
notes: 11 files: all .json. Single subdir: fixtures/ecosystem-v2/ (11 fixture files). File list: deferred-item-full.json, deferred-item-partial.json, deferred-item-stub.json, invocation-full.json, retro-full.json, retro-partial.json, retro-stub.json, review-full.json, review-partial.json, review-stub.json, warning-full.json. RESOLUTION: tests/ is the primary test suite (232 files, .ts/.js). test/ is a fixtures-only companion — JSON schema fixtures for ecosystem-v2 data contracts. Both are active. test/ is NOT deprecated. The naming split is deliberate: test/ = fixtures, tests/ = specs. No Claude-adjacent artifacts.

name: config
purpose: Product rotation config — single JSON file containing rotation-policy configuration.
notes: 1 file: rotation-policy.json. Size: 4KB. No subdirs. This is root-level config/ (product config) — distinct from scripts/config/ (covered by D11a) and root-level dotfile configs (covered by D17a-b). Contains a single domain-specific policy file. No Claude-adjacent artifacts.

name: lib
purpose: Shared product library — TypeScript modules for auth, config, constants, contexts, DB, error knowledge base, Firebase, Firestore, hooks, logger, security, Sentry, and types.
notes: 34 files: 33 .ts, 1 .tsx. Size: 249K. Subdirs: auth/, config/, constants.ts, contexts/, db/, hooks/, security/, types/, utils/. Also root-level: error-knowledge-base.ts, firebase.ts, firestore-service.ts, logger.ts, recaptcha.ts, sentry.client.ts, utils.ts. lib/hooks/ contains use-tab-refresh.ts (React hook — note: separate from top-level hooks/ dir). No package.json — part of root Next.js project. No Claude-adjacent artifacts.

name: public
purpose: Static web assets — fonts, images, leaflet map icons, manifest.json, and PWA icon.
notes: 37 files: 20 .jpg, 10 .png, 2 .woff2, 2 .svg, 1 .json + font-samples.html. Size: 12M (image-heavy). Subdirs: fonts/, images/, leaflet-icons/. Entirely static binary/media assets — fully non-portable. No Claude-adjacent artifacts.

name: src
purpose: DataConnect generated types — Next.js/Firebase DataConnect auto-generated TypeScript and JS connector files.
notes: 15 files: 5 .json, 4 .md, 4 .js, 2 .ts. Size: 136K. Single subdir: dataconnect-generated/. Entire src/ is gitignored per .gitignore entry `src/dataconnect-generated`. NOT git-tracked — filesystem only. Classification: auto-generated artifact, should not be synced. SCHEMA_SPEC matrix lists src/ as D19b scope but this is a generated, gitignored dir.

name: styles
purpose: Global CSS — single globals.css file for Next.js app-wide styles.
notes: 1 file: globals.css. Size: 8KB. No subdirs. Entirely non-portable product styling. No Claude-adjacent artifacts.

name: types
purpose: Shared TypeScript type definitions — single journal.ts type file.
notes: 1 file: journal.ts. Size: 4KB. No subdirs. Minimal types dir. No Claude-adjacent artifacts.
